info.name: CargoPulse API v1
info.description:
Enterprise SaaS Logistics Platform - Multi-tenant shipment, fleet, and real-time tracking API.

**Environment Required:** `CargoPulse - Staging`

**Auth Flow:**
1. Run `01. Authentication & Onboarding > Login (Tenant Admin)` first
2. Token auto-saves to `{{tenant_admin_token}}` via test script
3. All authenticated requests inherit `{{tenant_admin_token}}` from the collection authorization.

request.description: Authenticate as internal SaaS user. Auto-saves `tenant_admin_token` and `tenant_id` to collection variables.
Authenticate as external B2B Merchant. Auto-saves `merchant_api_key`.
Authenticate as Driver. Auto-saves `driver_mobile_token` for mobile namespace requests.
Revoke current Sanctum token.

exec: pm.test('Logout success message', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql('Successfully logged out'); });

request.description: Verify token validity and retrieve current user profile with tenant scoping.
Generate a new API key for a merchant to use in B2B integrations.
Super Admin creates a new logistics company tenant on the platform.
Super Admin views all tenants. Bypasses TenantScope via withoutGlobalScope.

exec: pm.test('Response is paginated list', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Retrieve specific tenant configuration and subscription status.
Monitor Horizon queue health, failed jobs count, and Redis connectivity.

exec: pm.test('Health metrics present', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property('queue_size'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('failed_jobs'); });

request.description: Retrieve current SaaS tier, usage limits, and driver/warehouse quotas.
Process Stripe subscription upgrade to a higher SaaS tier.
**CRITICAL TEST:** Attempt to create a driver beyond the SaaS tier limit. Expect 402/403/422.

exec: pm.test('Error mentions limit or upgrade', function () { var msg = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(msg).to.match(/limit|upgrade|quota|tier/i); });

request.description: Create a new B2B merchant client. Auto-saves merchant ID and API key.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Acme E-Commerce Store",
  "contact_email": "ops@acme.com",
  "billing_email": "billing@acme.com",
  "phone": "+1-555-0100",
  "address": "123 Commerce St, New York, NY",
  "webhook_url": "https://acme.com/webhooks/cargopulse",
  "api_rate_limit": 1000
}

request.description: List all merchants belonging to the current tenant.

exec: pm.test('Tenant-scoped only', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; if (d.length > 0) { pm.expect(d[0].tenant_id).to.eql(parseInt(pm.collectionVariables.get('tenant_id'))); } });

request.description: Retrieve specific merchant configuration.
Set up event webhooks for a merchant to receive real-time shipment updates.
Retrieve merchant's Cash on Delivery reconciliation and delivery fee ledger.

exec: pm.test('Ledger data present', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property('balance'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('transactions'); });

request.description: Trigger GenerateMerchantInvoicesJob. Aggregates delivered shipments and emails unified PDF invoice.

item.name: Test RBAC: Warehouse Manager Accessing Invoice Generation

request.description: **CRITICAL TEST:** Warehouse Manager role should be forbidden from invoice generation. Expect 403.
Create a new shipment via API. Auto-saves shipment ID and tracking number.

body.raw:
{
  "merchant_id": "{{current_merchant_id}}",
  "tracking_number": "CP-79271963",
  "reference_number": "ORDER-12345",
  "recipient_name": "John Doe",
  "recipient_phone": "+1-555-0199",
  "recipient_email": "john@example.com",
  "destination_address": "456 Receiver Ave, Los Angeles, CA",
  "destination_lat": 34.0522,
  "destination_lng": -118.2437,
  "weight_kg": 2.5,
  "dimensions": {
    "length": 30,
    "width": 20,
    "height": 15
  },
  "cod_amount": 50.0,
  "delivery_notes": "Leave at front door",
  "service_type": "standard",
  "metadata": {
    "source": "api",
    "integration": "shopify"
  }
}

request.description: B2B merchant creates shipment using their API key. Tests merchant token abilities.

exec: pm.test('Merchant-scoped creation', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.merchant_id).to.eql(parseInt(pm.collectionVariables.get('current_merchant_id'))); });

request.description: Upload CSV with 500+ rows. Tests Action class batch processing and error reporting for malformed rows.

exec: pm.test('Error report for invalid rows', function () { if (jsonData.data.failed_count > 0) { pm.expect(jsonData.data.errors).to.be.an('array'); } });

request.description: Advanced search with filters, sorting, and strict database-level pagination.
Retrieve shipment with eager-loaded relations (merchant, status logs, route).
Valid state transition via spatie/laravel-model-states.
Assign shipment to a route and driver.
**CRITICAL TEST:** Attempt to skip from Pending directly to Delivered. Expect state transition exception.

exec: pm.test('Error indicates invalid transition', function () { var msg = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(msg).to.match(/transition|invalid|illegal|state/i); });

item.name: Test Tenant Isolation: Access Shipment from Other Tenant

request.description: **CRITICAL TEST:** Attempt to access shipment ID belonging to Tenant B while authenticated as Tenant A. Expect 404 via TenantScope.
Add a new warehouse/staging hub to the tenant.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Central Distribution Hub",
  "code": "CDH-001",
  "address": "1000 Logistics Way, Industrial District",
  "lat": 40.7128,
  "lng": -74.006,
  "manager_id": "{{current_user_id}}",
  "capacity": 5000,
  "active": true
}

request.description: List all warehouses for the current tenant.

exec: pm.test('Tenant-scoped list', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; if (d.length > 0) { pm.expect(d[0].tenant_id).to.eql(parseInt(pm.collectionVariables.get('tenant_id'))); } });

request.description: Highly optimized check-in endpoint. Updates shipment state and warehouse assignment.
Transfer shipment between internal warehouse locations.
Add a new driver to the fleet.
List all drivers for the tenant.
Create a daily route manifest assigned to exactly one driver. Auto-saves route ID.
**CRITICAL TEST:** Attempt to create a second route for the same driver on the same date. Expect validation failure.

exec: pm.test('Error mentions exclusivity or conflict', function () { var msg = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(msg).to.match(/exclusive|already assigned|conflict|exists/i); });

request.description: Driver starts the route. Triggers state machine update.
Manually reorder route stops or apply optimization algorithm.
Retrieve route with driver, stops, and shipment relations.
Driver retrieves their assigned route and stops for today. Uses `driver_mobile_token`.
Driver completes delivery. Triggers ShipmentDeliveredEvent and domain event listeners.
Driver marks delivery as failed. Tests alternative state transition path.
**HIGH CONCURRENCY TEST:** Push GPS coordinates. Must write to Redis only, no PostgreSQL I/O. Response < 200ms.
Simulate high-frequency GPS batch ingestion. Tests Redis Geospatial index throughput.

item.name: Test Token Scope: Driver accessing Web-only Route

request.description: **CRITICAL TEST:** Driver Sanctum token with `shipments:update` ability attempts to access analytics dashboard. Expect 403.

exec: pm.test('Driver blocked from admin route', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403, 401]); });
pm.test('Error indicates insufficient abilities', function () { var msg = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(msg).to.match(/forbidden|unauthorized|ability|permission/i); });

request.description: Public tracking endpoint. No authentication required. Returns latest Redis coordinates and status.
Test graceful handling of invalid tracking numbers.
Retrieve global KPI metrics scoped strictly to the active tenant.
Complex filtered search with multiple criteria and pagination.
Manually fire domain event to verify Horizon queues up all async listeners.

exec: pm.test('Listeners queued', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property('queued_jobs'); pm.expect(d.queued_jobs).to.include('SendDeliveryWebhookToMerchant'); pm.expect(d.queued_jobs).to.include('UpdateDriverMetrics'); pm.expect(d.queued_jobs).to.include('PushDeliveryNotificationToCustomer'); });

request.description: Force merchant webhook endpoint to return 500. Verify exponential backoff (1m, 5m, 15m) before failed job.

exec: pm.test('Webhook job queued with retry config', function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property('attempts'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('backoff_seconds'); pm.expect(d.backoff_seconds).to.be.above(0); });

request.description: Manually trigger the scheduled job that batches Redis GPS data to PostgreSQL PostGIS.
